items.title_en: Trump administration temporarily cuts student loan interest rates for borrowers on autopay
items.title_zh: 特朗普政府暂时降低自动转账借款人的学生贷款利率
items.desc_en: The Trump administration announced it will offer federal student loan borrowers who sign up for autopay a larger interest rate discount.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普政府宣布将为签署自动转账的联邦学生贷款借款人提供更大的利率折扣。

items.title_en: Bears step up bets against high-yield sector, shaking up bond traders
items.title_zh: 空头加大对高收益板块的押注，震动债券交易员

items.title_en: The average SpaceX buyer post-IPO is almost under water after two-day slide
items.title_zh: SpaceX 首次公开募股后的平均买家在经历了两天的下滑后几乎陷入困境
items.desc_en: Shares of SpaceX fell as much as 7% Thursday to $178, leaving the stock trading roughly in line with its volume-weighted average price of just under $180.
items.desc_zh: 周四，SpaceX 股价下跌 7%，至 178 美元，该股交易价格大致与其略低于 180 美元的成交量加权平均价格一致。

items.title_en: NBA to name winning bids for Europe teams in the coming months, deputy commissioner says
items.title_zh: NBA副总裁表示，将在未来几个月内确定欧洲球队的中标申办名单
items.desc_en: The NBA plans to name winning bidders for 12 permanent European teams in the next 60 to 90 days, Deputy Commissioner Mark Tatum told CNBC.
items.desc_zh: NBA 副总裁马克·塔图姆 (Mark Tatum) 向 CNBC 表示，NBA 计划在未来 60 至 90 天内为 12 支常驻欧洲球队确定中标者。

items.title_en: U.S. Navy ends blockade of Iran's ports and coastal areas

items.title_en: Parents of Serbia's teenage school shooter given jail terms in retrial

items.desc_zh: 2023 年，13 岁的男孩在贝尔格莱德的 Vladislav Ribnikar 学校杀害了 8 名女孩、一名男孩和一名学校警卫。

items.title_en: Kalshi traders see greater than 50% odds the Fed will hike rates this year

items.desc_zh: 美联储暗示可能会加息，卡尔希交易员认为 2026 年加息的可能性越来越大。

items.desc_en: Two sides of a political chasm share one fear in Colombia’s presidential race: A return to the past  AP NewsTrump Ally Vowing Death to Cartels Closes In on Colombia Presidency  Bloomberg.comColombia’s
items.desc_zh: 政治鸿沟的双方在哥伦比亚总统竞选中都有一个共同的担忧：回到过去 美联社新闻 特朗普盟友发誓要消灭卡特尔，哥伦比亚总统大选即将来临 Bloomberg.com哥伦比亚

items.title_en: Bird flu kills more than 75% of baby seals on remote Australian island, study finds
items.title_zh: 研究发现，澳大利亚偏远岛屿上75%以上的小海豹死于禽流感
items.desc_en: Scientists say 13,000 southern elephant seal pups on Heard Island have died of the H5N1 strain.
items.desc_zh: 科学家表示，赫德岛上有 13,000 只南象海豹幼崽死于 H5N1 病毒株。

items.title_en: Teenager dies in horse-drawn carriage accident in New York
items.title_zh: 青少年在纽约马车事故中丧生
items.desc_en: The horse bolted and toppled over after the carriage driver stepped down to take a picture of the passengers.
items.desc_zh: 马车夫下车给乘客拍照后，马匹狂奔并翻倒。

items.title_en: Japan ramping up defence is 'critical' to prevent war, Defence Minister Koizumi tells BBC
items.title_zh: 日本防卫大臣小泉纯一郎告诉 BBC，日本加强防卫对于防止战争“至关重要”
items.desc_en: Japan needs to revisit the pacifist posture that has defined it since World War Two, Shinjiro Koizumi says.
items.desc_zh: 小泉进二郎表示，日本需要重新审视自第二次世界大战以来定义的和平主义姿态。
